violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and/or debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels (missing establishment information and ingredients. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name and address. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Inspector observed dish-washer's wash cycle at 149 degrees Fahrenheit. Wash cycle must be at 155 degrees Fahrenheit. Establishment to use 3 bay sink until dish-machine is serviced. PIC called for service during inspection Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Cold-holding and hot-holding units were observed in poor repair in the self-serving area. Ambient cold-hold well was 63 degrees F and water temperature of the hot-hold well was 105 degrees F. PIC took holding units out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
Inspector observed dishwasher wash cycle at 140 degrees F. Wash cycle must reach 150 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -kettle cooker, -tables under grills, -shelves under food prep tables, -1 door freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
Steamer unit contains an air break. An air gap is required. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The lights under the hood vents in the kitchen area is in poor repair (two lights were out). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
